blocks.text: That works, and thank you for turning it around so quickly. I will quote the audited numbers for the two revenue lines and note the basis in the margin, so there is no question later about where either figure came from.

Ahead of the session John Macias is setting up, I will circulate the current message draft and a short agenda a couple of days out, so you can read it cold before we sit down. If any of the {{fact:f:E-2023-001.client}} positioning strikes you wrong on that first pass, mark it up and we will start the session there.
